C[andrewLsmith84: wow, I played that so bad down there
andrewLsmith84: or you played that so well, haha
C[burritos: haha it was a tricky business down there.  still a lot of game left to go.

C[andrewLsmith84: i'm pretty impressed.  you've managed to make it pretty close.  if I don't wisen up, you'll take it down!  Reviewing this game is going to shed a lot of light on my middle-game problems.  I appreciate you playing with me!
C[burritos: Sure thing, we'll see where the dust settles but stll plenty of room to get messy haha

C[andrewLsmith84: Hey Mike.  I took the slate and shell stones and older goban to the FIU Go Club.  We didn't have ample storage for big boards, so I actually entrusted it to the current president of the club, Thompson.  He's a kind and strange, pseudo-autistic lad, but with a good heart and a ton of dedication to Go.  He's improved a lot, and he's been working very hard to promote Go in the university.  Also, his family is extremely poor, so the best he was ever hoping for was to maybe one day own a cheap plastic set.  I told him that when he graduates in a few years, that set will be his, so take good care of it, and use it to promote the game.  By then, the club will have purchased 3-5 big sets of similar quality, so I hope you don't mind him having it in his possession.  If anything, I hope that it ensures the club at FIU for a few years after I'm gone, plus a another to continue his journey in go for a bit longer.  Thanks a lot for your considerate donation.  It is very honourable of you, sir!
C[burritos: Sure, glad it's found a good home!
C[andrewLsmith84: Have you been to the Miami Go Club lately?  (obviously I haven't, or I wouldn't be asking)
C[burritos: Nope, I haven't been since you saw me there last.
C[andrewLsmith84: A bunch of us will be there today.  You should drop by if you are free.
C[andrewLsmith84: Show me your Dan skills, Mike... predict the score
C[burritos: Your time is running low btw
burritos: Looks like you're at about 61 points and I'm at 81
C[andrewLsmith84: good game ripping the right side from me!  when do you think we'll see you again in the club?
C[burritos: Not sure just yet, next month is booked as far as weekends go.  Just bought a new house so lots to do with moving and setting up, etc.
burritos: good job in cutting off those 4 stones

andrewLsmith84: thanks.  I replayed the game and realized I often defend in the wrong ""direction"".  I still have a ways to go in learning what is safe and what isn't in terms of approaches  and invasions in the corners.

andrewLsmith84: hopefully we'll see at club sometime.  I still want to set up a regular online meet up.  maybe we have to go florida-wide.  I've almost finished a Google Doc that has collected information from the people I met at the OGS.  Maybe we can use this to built a stronger Floridan community.  I'll share it soon.
burritos: all sounds great, thanks!  I'll try to come more often once the house is all settled
C[burritos: hi, have a good game!
Levvo: Thank you for the game! =)
